---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a package, runtime, API, or tooling improvement
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Goal

Describe the user-facing capability.

## Use Case

Explain why this belongs in a frozen browser OCaml toolchain.

## Proposed Shape

Describe API, manifest, runtime, or script changes if known.

## Constraints

List package, memory, browser compatibility, or static asset constraints.

## Validation

Describe the fixture, test, or browser harness coverage that should prove it works.
